title: Sweet Canadian Vermicelli Noodles
description: A sweet, chewy, and energizing Canadian dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, slow-cooked to perfection with a blend of local flavors. This low-calorie-friendly recipe is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together the maple syrup, soy sauce, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the whisked sauce to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the diced roasted butternut squash to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the vermicelli rice noodles to the saucepan and stir to combine with the sauce and squash.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the noodles are cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
